articles.title: THE FASTEST WAY TO BUILD AI APPS
articles.summary: Writer is excited to introduce Writer AI Studio [4], the fastest way to build AI apps, products, and features. Writer's unique full-stack design makes it easy to prototype, deploy, and test AI apps [4] – allowing developers to build with APIs, a drag-and-drop open-source Python framework, or a no-code builder, so you have flexibility to build the way you want.

articles.title: Start building with Writer AI STUDIO.
OPENAI O1 SYSTEM CARD
articles.summary: This report outlines the safety work carried out prior to releasing OpenAI o1 and o1-mini, including external red teaming and frontier risk evaluations according to OpenAI's Preparedness Framework.

articles.title: PERPLEXITY EXPANDING IT'S PUBLISHER'S PROGRAM
articles.summary: Perplexity has added over a dozen international news organizations to its Publishers' Program, offering tools, revenue sharing, and support to strengthen collaboration with global media.

articles.title: DEEPMIND'S GENIE 2 CAN GENERATE INTERACTIVE WORLDS THAT LOOK LIKE VIDEO GAMES
articles.summary: DeepMind's Genie 2 is an advanced AI model that generates diverse, interactive 3D worlds from images and text descriptions. The model is particularly adept at simulating complex elements like physics and NPC behavior, setting it apart from similar models by maintaining scene consistency. Positioned as a research tool, Genie 2 is designed for prototyping interactive experiences and evaluating AI agents.

articles.title: PALIGEMMA 2
articles.summary: Paligemma 2 is one of the best VLMs on the market today. It uses SigLIP and Gemma.

articles.title: LAND COVER MAPPING WITH ASANET
articles.summary: The Asymmetric Semantic Aligning Network (ASANet) improves land cover classification using both SAR and RGB images.

articles.title: FASTER MULTI-MODAL MODELS WITH TOKEN MERGING
articles.summary: Researchers have developed a training-free method to make multi-modal language models (LLMs) more efficient without sacrificing much performance. Their approach reduces computational demands by up to 7 times by smartly merging and pruning visual data tokens.

articles.title: RETHINKING CHANGE MANAGEMENT IN THE AGE OF AI
articles.summary: With the rise of AI and evolving customer expectations, businesses have to move beyond temporary fixes and adopt a culture of continuous transformation. Get the guide by Camunda [11] to find out how to align stakeholders, leverage technology and data, and embed a mindset of

articles.title: GRAPHCAST
articles.summary: DeepMind has open sourced its GraphCast algorithm, which is substantially better and faster at localized weather prediction at 36 hours. It also runs in a fraction of the time.

articles.title: CREATING OPTICAL ILLUSIONS
articles.summary: This project advances visual anagram generation - images that change appearance when flipped or rotated - by refining how diffusion models handle multiple viewpoints.

articles.title: 3D SCENE COMPLETION FOR AUTONOMOUS VEHICLES
articles.summary: ScoreLiDAR is a new method that speeds up 3D LiDAR scene completion for autonomous vehicles.

articles.title: NEW FISH AUDIO MODEL
articles.summary: The newest Fish Audio 1.5 is currently #2 on Text To Speech Leaderboards behind ElevenLabs. It supports voice cloning and is fast to run, although the output quality seems hit or miss.

articles.title: OPENAI PARTNERS WITH ANDURIL
articles.summary: OpenAI and defense company Anduril have partnered to create a national security-based AI.

articles.title: KEY LEADERS BEHIND GOOGLE'S VIRAL NOTEBOOKLM ARE LEAVING TO CREATE THEIR OWN STARTUP
articles.summary: Three key Google NotebookLM members have left to start a new stealth AI venture. The startup aims to leverage the latest AI models to create consumer-facing, user-first AI products. It remains in its early stages without a clear focus or announced funding.

articles.title: HOW CITI, RIPJAR, AND CLOUDFACTORY ARE USING AI IRL
articles.summary: AI in the real world isn't just ChatGPT. It's building robust systems with firm guardrails and solving practical challenges around inference, data, and models. Watch the recorded presentation from

articles.title: DEEPTHOUGHT 8B REASONING MODEL (HUGGING FACE HUB)
articles.summary: Ruliad has released a small reasoning model that takes extra time to think through problems.

articles.title: GUI AGENTS
articles.summary: A collection of research papers and projects on large language model-brained GUI agents.

articles.title: SAM ALTMAN SAYS ARTIFICIAL GENERAL INTELLIGENCE IS ON THE HORIZON
articles.summary: Sam Altman, CEO of OpenAI, stated at the DealBook Summit that Artificial General Intelligence might impact everyday life less significantly than expected.
